name: marees-port-tudy
description: Application client/serveur des marées de Port-Tudy (île de Groix) : API REST Node.js + dashboard Vue 3.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm -w server run dev" "npm -w client run dev"
scripts.dev:auth: APP_PASSWORD=${APP_PASSWORD:-marees-dev} APP_USER=${APP_USER:-marees} ADMIN_PASSWORD=${ADMIN_PASSWORD:-admin-dev} ADMIN_USER=${ADMIN_USER:-admin} npm run dev
scripts.build: npm -w server run build && npm -w client run build
scripts.start:auth: APP_PASSWORD=${APP_PASSWORD:-marees-dev} APP_USER=${APP_USER:-marees} ADMIN_PASSWORD=${ADMIN_PASSWORD:-admin-dev} ADMIN_USER=${ADMIN_USER:-admin} npm run start
scripts.test: npm -w server run test && npm -w client run test
